name: Stöten i Sälen
description: Located in the Dalarna region near the Norwegian border, Stöten is widely regarded as the premier destination within the Sälen mountain range. While the Swedish mountains are lower in elevation than the Alps, Stöten distinguishes itself by offering the highest vertical drop and some of the most diverse terrain in the region, making it a favorite for both families and serious skiers. Stöten i Sälen has been announced as a new Indy Pass member for the 26/27 season. Access to this mountain does not begin until fall/winter 2026/27.
